notes: Students grievance details extracted from the approved facilities page.
description: The grievance cell looks into student grievances and the page says students may express grievances online through the grievance form mentioned there.

notes: Health service details extracted from the approved facilities page.
description: The college doctor is available on campus for consultation, regular health check-ups are conducted, and nearby hospital services are available at Mahatma Gandhi Medical College and Research Institute.
location: Campus and nearby Mahatma Gandhi Medical College and Research Institute

notes: Transport details extracted from the approved facilities page.
description: The college has a fleet of 18 buses for students and staff from various parts of the city and neighbouring areas.

notes: Internet service details extracted from the approved facilities page.
description: The college is a member of the National Knowledge Network with 40 Mbps bandwidth and also has a 100 Mbps BSNL internet connection monitored through a firewall.

notes: WiFi details extracted from the approved facilities page.
description: Access points have been deployed in a few blocks in the campus so internet can be accessed within the college premises.

notes: Only the limited hostel description explicitly present on the approved facilities page is included here.
description: The facilities page states that hostel facilities are available for boys and girls, vegetarian food is provided, and a separate hostel building with One Lakh Sq. ft. is being constructed.
